# ZScaledIt

> A customer acquisition and sales-systems agency for vehicle service businesses in the US: vehicle wrap shops, PPF installers, ceramic coating and tint shops, auto glass, and detailing operations.

## What you do

ZScaledIt builds complete customer acquisition systems, not just ad campaigns, for vehicle service businesses. Every engagement includes Meta Ads management, Google Ads management, CRM setup with automated SMS and email follow-up, a custom landing page built for the client's city and services, conversion tracking (Meta Pixel and Conversions API, Google Tag), 15 or more monthly creative variations, weekly performance reporting, and sales process consulting.

The agency was founded on direct, hands-on experience inside the vehicle wrap industry, which shapes how campaigns are targeted, priced, and creatively angled for commercial fleet buyers versus retail color-change buyers, and for the adjacent PPF, ceramic coating, tint, auto glass, and detailing niches.

New clients receive a free market audit before any engagement, and their first $500 in ad spend is covered by ZScaledIt. The agency caps its roster at 20 clients and works with only one business per local market, regardless of vehicle service niche.

## Who you work with

Vehicle service business owners in the United States: vehicle wrap shops (commercial and retail), PPF installers, ceramic coating applicators, window tint businesses, auto glass companies, and detailing operations. Active clients are located in Florida, Minnesota, Louisiana, Tennessee, Illinois, and Texas; most other US markets are open.

## How to engage

Book a free 30-minute competitor analysis and growth audit at https://www.zscaledit.site/contact.html. No pitch, an honest read on the prospect's market and what a ZScaledIt engagement would look like.
